contentSyncTriggers: CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_products_fts_BEFORE_UPDATE BEFORE UPDATE ON `products` BEGIN DELETE FROM `products_fts` WHERE `docid`=OLD.`rowid`; END
CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_products_fts_BEFORE_DELETE BEFORE DELETE ON `products` BEGIN DELETE FROM `products_fts` WHERE `docid`=OLD.`rowid`; END

CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_products_fts_AFTER_UPDATE AFTER UPDATE ON `products` BEGIN INSERT INTO `products_fts`(`docid`, `name`, `product_id`, `notes`) VALUES (NEW.`rowid`, NEW.`name`, NEW.`product_id`, NEW.`notes`); END

CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_products_fts_AFTER_INSERT AFTER INSERT ON `products` BEGIN INSERT INTO `products_fts`(`docid`, `name`, `product_id`, `notes`) VALUES (NEW.`rowid`, NEW.`name`, NEW.`product_id`, NEW.`notes`); END
entities.createSql: CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` USING FTS4(`name` TEXT NOT NULL, `product_id` TEXT NOT NULL, `notes` TEXT, content=`products`)
